name: The exact Induction, in only logical operators and connectives, showing the crystal of types to be a lossless compression of category theory

phase_0.domain_name: The exact Induction, in only logical operators and connectives, showing the crystal of types to be a lossless compression of category theory

VINIT.justification: the bare abstract category exists as uninitialized void before any projection

TANCH.justification: the closed boundary that contains the entire crystal system

AFWD.justification: forward morphism that projects categorical objects onto their 12-tuple equivalence classes

AREV.justification: reverse morphism that recovers an equivalence class from its 12-tuple address

CLINK.chosen_element: sequential chaining of L1–L6, I1–I4, A1–A5 operations
CLINK.justification: composition of the derivation steps in order

IMSCRIB.justification: identity morphism that survives the quotient as self-recognition (the ⊙ gate)

FSPLIT.justification: branching a categorical operation into true/false arms (e.g., limit exists vs limit diverges)

FFUSE.justification: reconstituting the original categorical operation from the two arms, closing the Frobenius pair

EVALT.justification: affirmative evaluation of the construction success

EVALF.justification: negative evaluation of the construction failure

ENGAGR.justification: paradice: both forward and reverse morphisms active simultaneously without resolution

IFIX.justification: permanent irreversible record of the crystal address

phase_3.void_description: prima_materia before projection — no crystal address
phase_3.true_description: successful construction: limit exists and colimit universal
phase_3.false_description: failed construction: limit diverges or colimit non-universal
phase_3.both_description: dagger structure: forward and reverse held simultaneously in paradice

steps.domain_action: chain L1–L6 operations in true arm
chain failed operations in false arm
dagger structure activates both arms simultaneously

phase_5.compiler_frontend: quotient map from category to crystal (crystal_encode)
phase_5.memory_mechanism: 17,280,000 address space each as 27×1024×625 mixed-radix number
phase_5.alfs_store: crystal_decode ∘ crystal_encode = id bijection in Lean

phase_6.cycle_cost: intra-fiber degrees of freedom (3 dimensions) are hidden but recoverable
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: categorical object with full intra-fiber richness
phase_6.post_cycle_state: 12-tuple equivalence class (compressed) plus idle decode capacity
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the bijection guarantees no information is destroyed, only compressed

lean_scaffold:

--   [5] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [6] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [7] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def the_exact_induction_in_only_logical_operators_and_connectives_showing_the_crystal_of_types_to_be_a_lossless_compression_of_category_theory_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (prima_materia exists as uninitialized void)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (crystal_encode projects onto 12-basis)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (folding branches into true/false arms) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (true arm registers limit existence)
      -- F-branch (4 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (false arm registers limit divergence)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (chain L1–L6 operations in true arm)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (chain failed operations in false arm)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (dagger structure activates both arms simultaneously))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (unfolding reconstitutes original operation)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑙 𐑗)  -- [9] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Yoneda embedding recognizes identity)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑠 𐑭)  -- [10] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (crystal_decode recovers equivalence class)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑗 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (mixed-radix encoding seals the address)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (12-primitive basis closes the system)

noncomputable def the_exact_induction_in_only_logical_operators_and_connectives_showing_the_crystal_of_types_to_be_a_lossless_compression_of_category_theory_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
